---
description: 'Rules for authoring top-level customization-library artifacts in this repository.'
applyTo: 'agents/**/*.md,instructions/**/*.md,skills/**/SKILL.md,hooks/**/README.md,workflows/**/*.md'
---

When editing library artifacts in this repository:
- Preserve required front matter and naming conventions already defined in the root AGENTS.md.
- Keep descriptions concrete, brief, and trigger-oriented.
- Prefer examples that teach when to use a resource, not just what it is.
- Do not invent schema fields; follow existing repository patterns.
- If a change affects discoverability or generated indexes, run the documented build/validation commands.
